cards.name: Exploding Kitten
cards.description: Show immediately. Unless you play a Defuse you are out. Reinsert the kitten anywhere into the draw pile in secret.

cards.name: Defuse
cards.description: Play instead of dying when you draw an Exploding Kitten. Place Defuse in the discard pile, then secretly reinsert the kitten anywhere in the draw pile.

cards.name: Attack
cards.description: End your turn without drawing a card. Force the next player to take 2 turns in a row. Attacks stack — if the victim plays an Attack, all remaining turns transfer plus 2 more.

cards.name: Skip
cards.description: Immediately end your turn without drawing a card. When played against an Attack, only ends 1 of the 2 owed turns.

cards.name: Favor
cards.description: Force any other player to give you 1 card from their hand. They choose which card to give you.

cards.name: Shuffle
cards.description: Randomly shuffle the draw pile so that no one knows the order of the cards.

cards.name: See the Future
cards.description: Privately view the top 3 cards of the draw pile and put them back in the same order. Do not show other players.

cards.name: Nope
cards.description: Stop any action except an Exploding Kitten or a Defuse. Can be played at any time before an action resolves, even on another player's turn. A Nope can be Noped to create a Yup, and so on.

cards.name: Tacocat
cards.description: Powerless on its own. Play two Tacocats as a pair to steal a random card from another player, or three as a triple to name the card you want.

cards.name: Hairy Potato Cat
cards.description: Powerless on its own. Play two Hairy Potato Cats as a pair to steal a random card from another player, or three as a triple to name the card you want.

cards.name: Beard Cat
cards.description: Powerless on its own. Play two Beard Cats as a pair to steal a random card from another player, or three as a triple to name the card you want.

cards.name: Cattermelon
cards.description: Powerless on its own. Play two Cattermelons as a pair to steal a random card from another player, or three as a triple to name the card you want.

cards.name: Rainbow-Ralphing Cat
cards.description: Powerless on its own. Play two Rainbow-Ralphing Cats as a pair to steal a random card from another player, or three as a triple to name the card you want.
